name: studio.list_keywords
description: Enumerate tracked SEO keywords for an Actium Studio site. Returns keyword, current rank, search volume, and trend.
whenToUse: Reporting flow: answer 'which keywords is this site ranking for' with concrete rank data.
Content-planning input: identify keywords with high volume and poor rank as update targets.
Trend tracking: flag keywords moving downward so the operator can intervene.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants technical SEO issues — use studio.get_seo_report; this skill is keyword-rank data only.
Caller wants to add a new keyword to track — use studio.add_keyword; this is read-only.
Caller wants raw analytics traffic — use studio.get_analytics_overview; keyword-rank data lags real-time visits.
